characters.name: 3D Dave
characters.description: 3D DaveFull Name3D DaveAliasesDaveAge50's or 60'sGenderMaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorWhiteEye ColorBlackFaction3D Dave'sLocationPeacevilleFirst Appearance"Dreamreaver Part 1"Latest Appearance"Hear Us Rock Part 1"Voice ActorAlex Nussbaum 3D Daveis a mentally unstable scientist that owns the eponymous3D Dave's, which is the most "mentally stable" home electronics store in Peaceville. He first appeared in the episode "Dreamreaver Part 1" in the commercial for his store. He is voiced byAlex Nussbaum 3D Dave seems to be a mentally unstable scientist who can't seen to hold still. He is very excitable and overly happy about everything that happens. He is always "ticking" in some sort of way. Unexpectedly jumping, screaming, flailing, and his eyes will jump. In general, his mental instabilities could maybe be seen as an exaggerated portrayal of stereotypical ADHD.

characters.name: Allie Day
characters.description: Allie DayFull NameAllie DayAge9–10GenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlackFriendsKate Persky,Corey Riffin,Laney Penn,Kin Kujira,Kon KujiraEnemiesTrina Riffin(formerly),Mina Beff(formerly)FactionGroupiesLocationGarage replicaFirst Appearance"Pilot"Latest Appearance"Curse of the Metrognome"Voice ActorMadelyn May Allie Dayis one ofGrojband's adorable super-fans. She and herbest friend,Kate, are the biggest fans of Grojband and have a crazy obsession for them. Allie is a pretty and cute blonde-haired girl. She usually squeals whenever she sees Grojband and is in love with every single member of the band, especially Corey. She is voiced byMadelyn May. Allie is a Grojband-obsessed fangirl who will risk her life to help out the band. She is obsessed with the band and will bathe and grieve over them in awe toward their pure rock legend. Allie is a Grojband-obsessed fangirl who will risk her life to help out the band. She is obsessed with the band and will bathe and grieve over them in awe toward their pure rock legend.

characters.name: Ancient Sambans
characters.description: TheAncient Sambansare a legend ofRock Lorehistory that was told by Kin and Kon in the episode "Hear Us Rock Part 1". The Ancient Sambans were people who lived in the Egyptian times. They did a dance that predicted the future of the world. Their dance only showed that the world would only live on for 1001 more years before it got destroyed.

characters.name: Army of mimes
characters.actor_name: Tim Beresford(Kon),Sergio Di Zio(Kin),Bryn McAuley(Laney),Rob Tinkler(Barney),Melanie Leishman(Chipper)
characters.description: Army of mimesMembersMimey,Kin Kujira(briefly),Kon Kujira(briefly),Laney Penn(briefly),Sausage Barney(briefly),ChipperNumber of MembersAt least 14TypePerformersLocationPeaceville ParkFirst Appearance"Myme Disease"Latest Appearance"Myme Disease"Voice ActorsTim Beresford(Kon),Sergio Di Zio(Kin),Bryn McAuley(Laney),Rob Tinkler(Barney),Melanie Leishman(Chipper)Thearmy of mimesis a group of mimes lead byMimeythat appeared in "Myme Disease." They are dedicated to their jobs as street performers and they crave to have publicity inPeaceville Park. They fight their way to the top by attacking people and infecting them withmime disease, which turns them into mimes. Their goal is to secureStatue Steve's performance space for themselves.

He is a member of a pirate crew along withCaptain Tighty WhiteyandShaven Beard. He is voiced byKedar Brown.[1]

characters.name: Barney Barnley
characters.description: Barney BarnleyFull NameBarney BarnleyAliasesBean Barney, Bobble Barney, Cake Barney, Gym Barney, Hat Barney, Movie-in-Your-Car Barney, Mullet Barney, Outdoor Barney, Salad Barney, Sausage Barney, Star Barney, Sweet BarneyAge40-50GenderMaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorBald (brown facial hair)Eye ColorBlackFriendsCorey Riffin,Kin Kujira,Kon Kujira,Laney Penn,Trina Riffin(mixed),Party Danimal, andMayor Mellow(possibly)EnemiesMimeyRelativesBarnina Barnley(daughter), an unnamed son-in-law, and three other unnamed daughtersFactionBake Barn,Bean Barn,Bobble Barney's, Candy Factory,Movie-in-Your-Car Barn,Fuse This,Gym Barn,Hat Barn,Salad Barn, Hotdog Stand, Outdoor Barney's,Star Barney's Astronaut Training PlaceLocationPeacevilleFirst Appearance"All You Need Is Cake"Latest Appearance"Hear Us Rock Part 2"Voice ActorRobert Tinkler Barney Barnleyis a very rich billionaire who owns and works at multiple businesses acrossPeaceville. In almost every episode he appears in, Barney[1]is seen working at one of his jobs. When he's working at this job, he is dressed in a hat that is related to his job and is addressed with a word put in front of his own name related to the particular job. He is voiced byRobert Tinkler.

characters.name: Barnina Barnley
characters.description: Barnina BarnleyFull NameBarnina BarnleyAliasesThe Sweetest Little Bride in Peaceville (by her father)Age30's (presumably)GenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlackRelativesBarnina's husband (husband),Barney Barnley(father), three unnamed sistersFactionBake BarnLocationPeacevilleFirst Appearance"All You Need Is Cake"Latest Appearance"All You Need Is Cake"Voice ActorUnknown Barnina Barnleyis the daughter ofBarney Barnley. She appeared in the episode "All You Need Is Cake." She was having a very expensive wedding which had the biggestwedding cakein the world. Barnina Barnley is the daughter of Barney and heiress to the Bake Barn. She made her first and so far only appearance in the episode "All You Need Is Cake." In this episode, Barney was throwing a hugeweddingfor her and her fiance. Barney was setting up the wedding for her and she was acting very ornery and bratty when it came to setting everything up.; she was seen barking out commands at all the people who worked there, wanting everything to be absolutely perfect. When Grojband came to play at her wedding, she demanded that they don't play there, unless any of them were to actually fall in love. Eventually, Corey and Laney faked being a couple and they then got the consent of Barnina to play there. She was later seen happily holding her husband with her as Corey and Laney sang aduetfor them. After the song, Barnina was so overjoyed that she squeezed her groom to the point where he exploded into a bunch of butterflies. Barnina is very controlling of her wedding and gets very furious when something goes wrong. She is also shown to be very emotional as she squeezed her husband with rapture after Corey and Laney's song.
characters.personality_section: Barnina is very controlling of her wedding and gets very furious when something goes wrong. She is also shown to be very emotional as she squeezed her husband with rapture after Corey and Laney's song.

characters.name: Bear
characters.description: TheBearis a recurring character inGrojband. It is a bear atPeaceville Zoowhich first appeared in "Zoohouse Rock", before going on to make several appearances in other episodes. It appears to have the ability to talk, and seemed to fall in love withKonwhen he was wearing a bear costume, where they shared fish butts together. It reappears in "Who Are You" where HipsterCoreyshows boredom at its attempts to scare him, leaving the bear to become ahipsteras well. It is a giant bear with blue fur. In the episodeWho Are Youit becomes ahipsterand puts on a pair of hipster shades. It is possible that this appearance is only temporary. However, at the same time, it is unknown whether it is or isn't due to the fact that this was the latest episode it appears in.

characters.name: Beat Bot
characters.description: Beat BotisKon Kujira'ssuperhero secret identity. He is a member ofThe Justice Band. Beat Bot wields theStar Drumand a pair of extra-large drumsticks. Beat Bot is Kon wearing a cardboard box over his head and another cardboard box around his body, he also has vacuum tubes covering his arms and legs, and a drum attached to his chest.

characters.name: Beatrice
characters.description: BeatriceFull NameBeatriceGenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorGreyEye ColorBlackFriendsBlancheandBerthaEnemiesGrojband(formerly)LocationPeacevilleFirst AppearanceRockersizeLatest AppearanceBee Bop A LoofahVoice ActorRobert Tinkler  Beatriceis an old lady that appeared in the episode "Rockersize." She is an old lady who goes to theGym Barnfor exercise and was soon turned into a giant, mutant monstrous superhuman who ran rampant around Peaceville. She would later cameo in a few subsequent episodes. Beatrice is a cranky old lady who does not hesitate whenever she expresses her anger or slight toward anything. She seems to be annoyed by pretty much everything, especially when it comes to other people and members of modern-day society being rebellious and atrocious, compared to how society was when she was younger. She expresses this anger by yelling and making mean comments about everything. When she was turned into aGorillandma, she expressed it, by attacking everything she hated and forcing everyone to obey her commands.

characters.name: Beavers
characters.description: BeaversMembersBeaversNumber of MembersAt least 4TypeConstruction WorkersLocationPeaceville DamFirst AppearanceSix Strings of EvilLatest AppearanceIt's in the CardTheBeaversare two construction worker beavers that work atPeaceville Dam. They first appeared in the episode "Six Strings of Evil" and they appeared again in the episode "It's in the Card." The beavers are both brown beavers with construction hats. They also wear orange construction vests. One of them also wears an undershirt.

characters.name: Bertha
characters.description: BerthaFull NameBerthaGenderFemaleRaceAfrican AmericanHair ColorWhiteEye ColorBlackFriendsBlancheandBeatriceEnemiesGrojband(formerly)LocationPeacevilleFirst AppearanceRockersizeLatest AppearanceThat's My JamVoice ActorDwayne Hill  Berthais an old lady that appeared in the episode "Rockersize." She appeared again later in the episodes "War and Peaceville" and "That's My Jam." Bertha is a nice and dear, but competitive old lady. In the episode "Rockersize," she was the nicest of the old ladies, but that all ended when she became aGorillandmaand she turned into a rampaging monster who destroyed everything she hated. Even then, Bertha "politely" forced her lifestyle down everyone's throat. She is shown to be very competitive and feisty when it comes to any sort of competition. In "That's My Jam," she was furious when she was competing against Corey and Trina in the Summer Jam Jam and she threw a huge fit when she lost. In "War and Peaceville," she got into a big argument withBeatriceover their heritages which evolved from a verbal argument to an all-out fistfight.

characters.name: Big Toe
characters.description: Big Toeis a monster truck that's shaped like a toe. It was in the Smash up Derby in theGrojband Pilot. It is unknown who drives it. Big Toe is a giant monster truck which has a body in the shape of a giant toe. It has giant black tires.

characters.name: Big Toe
characters.description: Big Toeis a monster truck that's shaped like a toe. It was in the Smash up Derby in theGrojband Pilot. It is unknown who drives it. Big Toe is a giant monster truck which has a body in the shape of a giant toe. It has giant black tires.

characters.name: Biteface
characters.description: BitefaceisBlade Stabbington'spet rat that he uses when scaring people. He has the ability to light himself on fire and attack people. Biteface was once a flaming rat of terror that Blade Stabbington used as a weapon to terrorize young children. He was only seen doing this once in a flashback story told byCorey,Kin, andKon. In this flashback, Blade threw Biteface at some children while they were singing which scared them and left them running and screaming while Biteface chased after them and jumped in to bite one of them in the face. Years later, Blade and Biteface retired because it was getting too hard for them to scare people and Biteface had lost his flame. However,Grojbandhelped train Blade and Biteface to become scary again.Laneyhelped Biteface get him flame back. They even used Blade and Biteface to help them win theScary Song Competitionand at the end oftheir song, Blade threw Biteface atThe Newmans, which sent them screaming and running away while Biteface blew up their musical instruments and set the stage in fire. Biteface is a gray furry rat with orange eyes and sharp fangs. He has a purple nose, a purple tail, and black hands. He is also able to set himself alight, with green flames burning on his back.

characters.name: Blade Stabbington
characters.description: Blade StabbingtonFull NameBlade StabbingtonAliasesThe Campfire Metal Master, ScaremasterAgeUnknownGenderMaleRaceAlienHair ColorWhiteEye ColorRedFriendsBitefaceandGrojbandEnemiesTrina RiffinandThe NewmansFactionCampfire Monster (retired)LocationTerror Nebula Fear-mulonFirst AppearanceCreepaway CampLatest AppearanceCreepaway CampVoice ActorSeán Cullen  Blade Stabbingtonis a monster that appeared in the episodeCreepaway Camp. He is from a campfire legend that is told about in many scary campfire stories. He is known as a legendary monster that scares children and turns everything scary. He is voiced bySeán Cullen. Blade Stabbington used to be a terrifying, nightmarish campfire monster who constantly terrorized children at Camp Screamly. But somewhere along the way, kids became too hard for him to scare and he was unable to do it anymore. After he sadly retired, he spent all time his time as a soft and wimpy pansy who spends his time at home, gardening. He sometimes cries over the fact that he is no longer who he used to be.

characters.name: Blanche
characters.description: BlancheFull NameBlancheAliasesGorillandmaAge90sGenderFemaleRaceCaucasianHair ColorGrayEye ColorBlackFriendsBertha,Beatrice,Barney, andGrojband(mixed)EnemiesGrojband(mixed) andMayor MellowFactionSeniorLocationPeacevilleFirst Appearance"Rockersize"Latest Appearance"Bee Bop A Loofah" (cameo)Voice ActorSeán Cullen Blancheis an old lady that appeared in the episode "Rockersize." Blanche is a old lady who wears a green dress and a very long blue skirt. She has gray hair that she wears in a bun. Blanche is a very old woman who is extremely hard of hearing. She constantly screams "I can't hear anything!" and will only hear people every now and then. She is easily annoyed and she gets angry and complains a lot. When she became aGorillandmain the episode "Rockersize," she was able to hear everything perfectly and she was really range and spent all of her time destroying everything that she didn't like. She was very threatening and like the other Gorillandmas, she forced her lifestyle down everyone else's throats.

characters.name: Blue Star of Rocklympus
characters.description: TheBlue Star of Rocklympusis an ancient, musical curse that has been around for millennia. It is a demonic, inhuman being that is hell-bent on eradicating all of the world's sources of music, other than itself and it only takes the forms of musical instruments. It's first recorded form was a flute, which is believed to be its original form. The Blue Star's instrument forms can play perfectly, leading to their adoration by unsuspecting victims. It took control of Nerdicius's mind and made him play a song that made him popular but also led to the death of all ofMt. Rocklympus. It appeared in the episode "Six Strings of Evil" as a guitar and Corey was its victim. The Blue Star of Rocklympus, in it's purest form, is a bright, glowing, neon blue wishing star with a brightly visible glow. Every instrument it takes the form of has the visual allusion of a "blue star" somewhere on its appearance. The Flute of Rocklympus is the first recorded form of the star. It's very possible that this is the first form because when it appeared, it seemed to have simply spawned into existence. The victim of the flute was a Rocklympian god namedNerdiciuswho was very unpopular and was struggling to find a way to become popular at the time. The star spawned as a flute there and hypnotized Nerdicius into playing it. The music of the flute was so attractive, that it made all of the popular goddesses fall in love with him and give him their attention. However, after a while, the mind-controlling power of the flute also caused him to become hateful of other music, causing him to destroy Mt. Rocklympus. The star had successfully destroyed one of the world's biggest sources of music and it was never seen as that form again. Only, in further points in history, it would appear again as another instrument to erase more music from existence.

characters.name: Bobby Blue
characters.description: Bobby Blueis a character that appeared in the episode "No Strings Attached". He is the leader ofThe Bubble Bunch Band. Bobby Blue is the main lead member of The Bubble Bunch Band. He is an aniamatronic one-eyed furry blue monster who plays blue maracas. He is also Corey's favorite of all the band members. The reason Corey is the band leader is quite possibly because the Bubble Bunch Band member that was his favorite was the leader of his band. Bobby Blue is a blue, furry, striped creature with one eye.

characters.name: Bodybuilders
characters.description: BodybuildersMembers2 males and 1 femaleNumber of Members3TypeAthletesLocationGym BarnFirst AppearanceRockersizeLatest AppearanceWho Are YouBodybuildersare several muscular individuals who appear in theGym Barn. Their body proportions are overexaggerated especially when compared to the rest of the characters. They first appeared inRockersizeand have gone on to be seen in other episodes, too. There are 3 bodybuilders: a tanned man, a dark-skinned man, and a woman. All three individuals are tall, have large arms, six-packs, and are very muscular. The tanned bodybuilder has light brown hair and black eyebrows. He wears a light yellow tank top, bright yellow briefs, and dark green sneakers.

He andCylus RiffinfoundedPeaceville. He was introduced in the episode "War and Peaceville."

characters.name: Buzz Newsworthy
characters.description: Buzz NewsworthyFull NameBuzz NewsworthyAge30sGenderMaleRaceHispanic or CaucasianHair ColorBlackEye ColorBlackFriendsChance HappeningFactionNews AnchormanLocationChannel 4 studio buildingFirst Appearance"All You Need Is Cake"Latest Appearance"Hear Us Rock Part 1"Voice ActorDwayne Hill Buzz Newsworthyis a news anchor who anchors forChannel 4 NewsalongsideChance Happening. His reports often relate toGrojband's antics. His first appearance was in the episode, "All You Need Is Cake" where he and Chance Happening were talking about the wedding that had the worlds largest cake in it. He appeared again in the episode "Monster of Rock" where he and Chance happening were on the news talking about the sewer monsterEl Chewpoocacaand how Corey had a crazy plan that just might work. He appeared again in the episode "Zoohouse Rock" where he was talking about an outbreak in the zoo at the end of the episode. Then he appeared again in the episode "A Knight to Remember" where he and Chance Happening were talking about the comet that crazed everything up. He appeared again, having a major role in the episode "Line of Credit" where he was telling on the news about Grojband going straight and was following them around spreading gossip and rumors about them on the news which forced them to have to do nutty things to protect their reputation. Buzz Newsworthy is a very handsome man on the news channel who's great at doing his job and looking good at it too. He's very happy and enthusiastic and will do his job no matter what happens. There are a lot of strange problems that happen during his time on the show and he'll sometimes get tied in with some of Corey's crazy plans, but no matter what, he happily tolerates it and continues to do the news with no struggle at all. The one problem that does bother him though is issues with his own co-worker Chance. The two of them will occasionally get into arguments and it will make him unhappy when working on the show. He can be very silly and make a lot of jokes on the show to make it more interesting.

characters.name: Bylaw 62.8
characters.description: Bylaw 62.8Full NameBylaw 62.8RaceBylawEye ColorBlackLocationPeacevilleFirst Appearance"The Bandidate"Latest Appearance"The Bandidate"Voice ActorTodd Kauffman Bylaw 62.8is a sentient municipal bill that appeared in the episode "The Bandidate." The bylaw itself states that in the case of an unscheduled absence of the mayor ofPeaceville, the acting mayor shall be chosen from amongst the winners of any vote held earlier the same day. The acting mayor is removed from office as soon as the mayor returns.

characters.name: Candy Jams
characters.description: Candy JamsFull NameCandy JamsGenderFemaleHair ColorPurple (Dyed)Eye ColorBlackFriendsGuy Broman,Laney Penn(formerly),Nick Mallory(love interest),Trina Riffin(formerly)EnemiesLaney Penn,Trina RiffinFactionPop SingerFirst Appearance"Girl Fest"Latest Appearance"Girl Fest"Voice ActorMegan Fahlenbock[1] Candy Jamsis a character that appeared in the episode "Girl Fest." She is a famous celebrity that sings music for teenage girls and kids. Candy Jams is tall and has pale white skin and long waist-length spiky indigo hair with scraggy bangs, which she wears with a red headband. She has a side shave, and she wears black eyeliner and a pair of ear piercings. She also has a beauty mark on the side of her face and tattoo on her left arm. She wears a sleeveless red and black striped blouse with a black diamond-encrusted necklace with a skull on it. She also has a bracelet of a similar look to her necklace as well as finger-less gloves. She wears blue shorts with white fringe at the bottom and  black leather boots. Candy Jams passes herself off as a tough feminist girl who makes her own decisions and pushes for women to be independent. However, this is all fake. She is truly a 17-year old girl who follows the orders of her managerGuy Broman. She is boy crazy and is actually the exact opposite of what she says she is. At some point she datedNick Mallory, and although she dumped him, she is still obsessed with him. She also is shown to get excited over clothes and has her manager write her songs without big words, as they give her 'brain ouchies'. Although she is generally a friendly person, she shoved Laney aside after Grojband's performance in order to promote her make-up.
